title: Craft Stairs Right!
description: This Project changes the crafting for all stairs to cost 3 wood and give 4 stairs, because A stair is 3/4 of a block 3 blocks must give you 4.
body:
This Minecraft mod/datapack changes the crafting for stairs to be cheaper and correct. 

The old way of crafting makes 0 sense.

The crafting is 3 planks make 4 stairs, the datapack works on all wood types including bambo and netherwoods.
